---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
---

> ⚠️ **Privacy first — do NOT paste real personal data.** Use placeholder/fake examples only. Issues are public; never include real CVs, exports, API keys, or personal information.

## What problem are you trying to solve?

Describe the need or the gap. "I'm trying to … but …".

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about.

## Does it affect the trust model?

Career Agent is built on hard invariants (local-first, single Egress Gate, No-Fabrication Rule — see [the architecture doc](../../docs/en/developer/architecture.md)). If your idea touches data handling, providers, or generated output, note how it preserves those guarantees.

## Additional context

Mockups, links, or examples (placeholder data only).
